provenance.source_corpus: Short‐term response of fish communities and water chemistry to breaching of a causeway in the Sarita River Estuary, British Columbia, Canada

source_spans.text: a causeway isolating the southern portion of the Sarita River estuary was breached in 2018
enhance juvenile salmon access

nodes.name: Colonization of Chinook and Chum Salmon

source_spans.text: promote colonization of Chinook and Chum Salmon in pools
Water chemistry was homogenized post-breach
increasing connectivity of the Sarita Estuary
reduce the fragmenting impact of estuary causeways

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: a causeway isolating the southern portion of the Sarita River estuary was breached in 2018 to enhance juvenile salmon and tidal water access into the southern portion of the estuary.

source_spans.text: a causeway isolating the southern portion of the Sarita River estuary was breached in 2018 to enhance juvenile salmon and tidal water access into the southern portion of the estuary.

source_document.title: Short‐term response of fish communities and water chemistry to breaching of a causeway in the Sarita River Estuary, British Columbia, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: Short-term goals of breaching were to: (1) enhance juvenile salmon access through the causeway; (2) promote colonization of Chinook and Chum Salmon in pools, while retaining Coho Salmon;

source_spans.text: Short-term goals of breaching were to: (1) enhance juvenile salmon access through the causeway; (2) promote colonization of Chinook and Chum Salmon in pools, while retaining Coho Salmon;

source_document.title: Short‐term response of fish communities and water chemistry to breaching of a causeway in the Sarita River Estuary, British Columbia, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: Water chemistry was homogenized post-breach, primarily due to increased saltwater penetration.

source_spans.text: Water chemistry was homogenized post-breach, primarily due to increased saltwater penetration.

source_document.title: Short‐term response of fish communities and water chemistry to breaching of a causeway in the Sarita River Estuary, British Columbia, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: short-term indicators suggest that breaching was effective in increasing connectivity of the Sarita Estuary, allowing access to 1.4 km 2 of habitat that had previously been inaccessible to juvenile salmon.

source_spans.text: short-term indicators suggest that breaching was effective in increasing connectivity of the Sarita Estuary, allowing access to 1.4 km 2 of habitat that had previously been inaccessible to juvenile salmon.

source_document.title: Short‐term response of fish communities and water chemistry to breaching of a causeway in the Sarita River Estuary, British Columbia, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: Breaching may be an effective tool to reduce the fragmenting impact of estuary causeways.

edges.original_sentence: Water chemistry was homogenized post-breach, primarily due to increased saltwater penetration.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: Following breaching, increased flow volume and velocities resulted in the removal of algal blooms and a rapid recovery of eelgrass stems.

source_spans.text: Following breaching, increased flow volume and velocities resulted in the removal of algal blooms and a rapid recovery of eelgrass stems.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: prior to breaching Chinook Salmon were absent in both pools; however, after breaching Chinook were observed in both pools.

source_spans.text: prior to breaching Chinook Salmon were absent in both pools; however, after breaching Chinook were observed in both pools.

source_document.title: Short‐term response of fish communities and water chemistry to breaching of a causeway in the Sarita River Estuary, British Columbia, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: Chum Salmon were also absent in both pools prior to breaching, and after breaching Chum were observed in the Saltwater Pool.

source_spans.text: Chum Salmon were also absent in both pools prior to breaching, and after breaching Chum were observed in the Saltwater Pool.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4ceb96ea1e0e
edges.original_sentence: Coho Salmon were only observed in the Freshwater Pool prior to breaching, but following breaching Coho were observed in both pools.
